zh.Askham, Westmoreland, England: 英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德阿斯哈姆
zh.Askham, Eden district, Westmorland, Engl: 英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德阿斯哈姆
zh.Askham, Westmorland, England: 英國維斯特莫藍德阿斯哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Sandford於1310年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德阿斯哈姆時，他的父親Robert de Sandford50歲，母親Agnes Gundreda de Westmoreland46歲。他於1331年與Idonea Lengleys English在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德阿斯哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1377年在英國享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Sandford于1310年出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德阿斯哈姆时，他的父亲Robert de Sandford50岁，母亲Agnes Gundreda de Westmoreland46岁。他于1331年与Idonea Lengleys English在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德阿斯哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1377年在英国享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sandford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Sandford was born in 1310, in Askham, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Sandford, was 50 and his mother, Agnes Gundreda de Westmoreland, was 46. He married Idonea Lengleys English in 1331, in Askham, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1377, in England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Sandford est né en 1310, à Askham, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Sandford, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Agnes Gundreda de Westmoreland, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Idonea Lengleys English en 1331, à Askham, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1377, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Sandford 1310 in Askham, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Sandford 50 und seine Mutter Agnes Gundreda de Westmoreland 46. Er hat 1331 in Askham, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom Idonea Lengleys English geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1377 im Alter von 67 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Sandford è nato il nel 1310 nel Askham, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Sandford, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Gundreda de Westmoreland, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Idonea Lengleys English nel 1331, nel Askham, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1377, nel England, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Sandfordが1310年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドアスクハムで生まれた時，父Robert de Sandfordは50歳，母Agnes Gundreda de Westmorelandは46歳であった。1331年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドアスクハムでIdonea Lengleys Englishと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1377年にイギリスで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Sandford(이)가 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 아스카에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Sandford(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Gundreda de Westmoreland(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1331년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 아스카에서 Idonea Lengleys English(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1377년 영국에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Sandford nasceu em 1310, em Askham, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Sandford, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Gundreda de Westmoreland, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Idonea Lengleys English em 1331, em Askham, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1377, em Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Sandford родился в 1310 г. в местности асхам, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Sandford было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Gundreda de Westmoreland, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Idonea Lengleys English в 1331 г. в местности асхам, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1377 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Sandford nació en 1310, en Askham, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Sandford, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Agnes Gundreda de Westmoreland, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Idonea Lengleys English en 1331, en Askham, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1377, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
